OFFICIAL ROADMAP (Phases 7–12; source of truth = Foundation/FOUNDATION_003_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md, mirrored in docs/KOOLERR_MASTER_TRACKER.md): Phase 7 Launch Readiness ✅ (phase-7-complete) → Phase 8 Final Product Validation ✅ (phase-8-complete) → Phase 9 Koolerr Academy ✅ (phase-9-complete) → Phase 10 Private Beta — Milestone 1 complete (phase-10-beta-milestone-1), phase in progress → Phase 11 Public Launch → Phase 12 Scale & Optimization. Do not begin new phase work without explicit founder approval.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.8 complete: Observability for launch day (additive/diagnostics only). Added serializeError() to shared/lib/logger.ts — a pure, additive helper that safely structures a caught Error (name/message/stack/Next digest) for logging; the existing logger object/log() are unchanged. Added GET /api/health — a lightweight, domain-free liveness readout (status/timestamp/uptimeSeconds/environment) for uptime monitors; no Auth/Billing/Business Brain/persistence access, always 200 (distinct from the deeper GET /api/readiness). No production logic changed and no existing call sites touched. 10 new tests (serializeError + health route); 833 total. Verified tsc + full suite + build clean. Awaiting review.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.7 complete: Accessibility pass (presentational only). Added a global keyboard-focus indicator in app/globals.css (:focus-visible outline using the existing --ring token; keyboard-only, mouse interaction visually unchanged). Hardened the mobile nav drawer (_components/mobile-nav.tsx): role=dialog + aria-modal + aria-label, Escape-to-close, focus moves to the Close button on open, and returns to the trigger on close (refs on trigger + close button). Shared icon-only controls (notification bell, hamburger, close) already labelled. No new tests (no DOM test env; presentational/behavioral) — verified via tsc + build. 823 total. NOTE: 7.6 (Layout/Data-Fetch Consolidation) DEFERRED — its only meaningful wins (removing the double auth call; parallelizing billing+auth reads) require touching Auth/Billing code, which the guardrails forbid; needs an explicit exception. Full keyboard tab-cycle containment in the drawer and a per-page icon-audit noted as possible follow-ups. Awaiting review.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.3b complete: Workforce Engine service test coverage (test-only; no source change). Added domains/workforce-engine/service.test.ts — 33 black-box tests over the previously-untested WorkforceEngineService, against the real InMemoryWorkforceEngineRepository plus a throwing-repo stub for INTERNAL_ERROR paths: workforce register (active status, nested-employee registration) / get (NOT_FOUND, tenant isolation) / list (org scoping); digital-employee register (missing-workforce failure) / get / list / update (responsibilities+status, NOT_FOUND, isolation); engagement-run trigger (pending, participant/parent threading, missing-workforce) / get (NOT_FOUND, isolation) / list (org scoping) / updateEngagementRunStatus (startedAt on running, completedAt on completed/failed, no timestamps otherwise, NOT_FOUND); updateWorkforce (goals/status, NOT_FOUND, isolation). No production code changed. 33 new tests; 823 total. 7.3 split: 7.3a Business Brain (done) + 7.3b Workforce Engine (done); 7.3c Dogfooding deferred. Awaiting review.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.3a complete: Business Brain service test coverage (test-only; no source change). Added domains/business-brain/service.test.ts — 28 black-box tests over the previously-untested BusinessBrainService, exercising it against the real InMemoryBusinessBrainRepository plus a throwing-repo stub for INTERNAL_ERROR paths: brain lifecycle (create/one-per-org/get), memory store + retrieval + tenant-isolation, queryMemory (type/scope/limit filters), contributeMemories (source stamping, empty batch), synthesizeInsights (empty report, pattern/gap/trend insights, mostDocumented), findRelatedMemories (overlap ranking, self-exclusion), listAllMemories/listMemoriesByWorkforce. Business Brain data model/behavior unchanged — tests only observe. 28 new tests; 790 total. Split approved: 7.3a Business Brain (done) → 7.3b Workforce Engine (next); 7.3c Dogfooding deferred. Awaiting review before 7.3b.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.4 complete: Loading & error resilience. Added the platform's first error boundary (app/(platform)/error.tsx, client) so a thrown route error renders a friendly retry/dashboard screen instead of the raw Next crash page (detailed error logged, never shown; digest surfaced as a support reference). Added shared skeleton primitives (_components/skeletons.tsx) — root loading.tsx refactored to use them, plus tailored list-shaped loading.tsx for /runs and /deliverables. Standardized empty states via shared _components/empty-state.tsx, adopted in the runs list and the deliverables Section (dashed-border style preserved). Presentational/route-segment files only; no domain/auth/data-model changes. No new tests (no DOM test env; presentational, no branchable logic) — verified via tsc + build. 762 total. Awaiting review before 7.3.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.2 complete: Terminology & label consistency sweep. Retired the stale 'Media Library' name for the /deliverables destination everywhere it appeared as a page name: nav label 'Media' → 'Deliverables' (nav-items.ts), creative and pipeline page links, and the dashboard stat card. The dashboard card counted media-only (scripts/videos/images); since it's now titled 'Deliverables' and links to the all-types page, its count was switched from mediaStats.total to allDeliverables.length so the label is truthful (the one small data-source change; flagged). Kept the legitimately media-specific 'Media Output' section heading; only its stale 'View library →' link relabeled. Unrelated 'Social Media'/'Median' strings left untouched. Copy/label only; 762 total (no new tests). Awaiting review before 7.4.

Phase 7 — Launch Readiness & Product Polish — Milestone 7.1 complete: Mobile navigation & responsive shell. The desktop-only header nav (previously hidden below the sm breakpoint, leaving mobile with no navigation) now has a mobile drawer: a hamburger button opens a right-side sheet listing the same links, closing on link/backdrop tap. Nav items extracted to a single pure source (_lib/nav-items.ts) that both desktop bar and mobile drawer render from; desktop output is byte-identical (CTO primary emphasis + founder-only Tower/Tracker preserved via visibleNavItems). New files: _lib/nav-items.ts (+test), _components/mobile-nav.tsx. Auth/founder logic untouched. 6 new tests; 762 total. Awaiting review before 7.2.

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.6 complete: Deliverables page + run-detail polish (UI copy/UX only). Deliverables page retitled 'Media Library' → 'Deliverables' with a subtitle covering all output types; the categorization logic extracted to a pure testable helper partitionDeliverables(); the 'Reports & Documents' section is now always visible with a proper empty state. Run detail: Workforce field is now a link to /workforces for navigation context (parallelized reads already landed in 6.2). Runs list heading standardized 'Engagement Runs' → 'Runs' to match nav/breadcrumb. 5 new tests; 756 total. Phase 6 (Launch Integrity) complete except the deferred Stripe webhook-secret pass tracked under remaining.

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.5 complete (scoped to rate limiting): Per-organization pipeline rate limiting. triggerAIWorkforce enforces a rolling 24h run limit (env PIPELINE_DAILY_RUN_LIMIT, default 10) via isRunLimitReached(); user-visible message when exceeded; fails open on read error. 8 new tests; 751 total. Stripe webhook-secret hardening deferred to a dedicated pass (tracked under remaining).

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.4 complete: In-app run-completion notifications. A notification bell in the platform header shows how many Engagement Runs have finished (completed/failed) since the user last acknowledged; clicking marks them seen (last-seen cookie) and opens /runs. Notifications derived live from runs via deriveRunNotifications() — no new table, no Business Brain memory type, no schema change. 13 new tests; 743 total.

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.3 complete: Legacy debt removal + shared utility extraction (no runtime/behavior/API change). Removed the legacy synchronous content pipeline: deleted infrastructure/content-workforce/executor.ts (executeContentEngagementRun) and dropped the legacy POST /api/runs handler; GET /api/runs preserved. Extracted two truly-duplicated utilities to shared/lib: timeAgo() and RUN_STATUS_LABELS + RUN_STATUS_BADGE_COLORS. 730 total (8 legacy POST tests removed).

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.2 complete: Pipeline retry & failure surface. Every department now runs via attemptStep() with bounded retry (1 initial + 2 retries, 2s backoff; backoff injectable for tests) so a transient provider failure no longer discards completed work; video still skips after exhausting retries. Permanent failures persist failedAtDepartment + failureReason to the Business Brain (no schema change), surfaced by a new pure findRunFailure() helper as a failure banner on /runs/[id]; that page's three independent reads parallelized. 14 new tests; 738 total.

Phase 6 — Launch Integrity — Milestone 6.1 complete: Video step made non-fatal in the AI Workforce pipeline. On video-plan failure the run records a 'skipped' progress memory and continues to Publishing → Approval → Delivery with buildSkippedVideoProductionBrief() fallback, instead of aborting and discarding completed research/strategy/creative work. New domain helper in video-production; pipeline progress status extended with 'skipped'; 10 new tests; 724 total.

Phase 5 — Core V1 Experiences — Milestone 5.5 complete: Operational Readiness (GET /api/readiness health check; /runs page rebuilt as Server Component with Pipeline CTA replacing legacy POST form; /deliverables expanded to show all 18 types including Reports & Documents section; 10 new tests; 714 total). Phase 5 complete.
Internal Dogfooding Phase 1 — Autonomous Marketing Department
